title: Anvil Stand Repair
description: Place an Armor Stand on an Anvil to passively repair armor over time. Features particle progress, sound effects, and balanced anvil durability mechanics.
body:
**A Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21**
_This mod adds a simple, immersive way to repair your gear without Mending or manual anvil work. Simply place an Armor Stand directly on top of an Anvil, and it becomes a powerful passive repair station!_


**🔧 Features**

**"Super Station" Capability:** _Repair up to 6 items simultaneously!_

**Supports all 4 Armor slots (Helmet, Chest, Legs, Boots).**

**Main Hand:** _Right-click to equip tools/weapons._

**Off Hand:** _Shift + Right-Click to equip a second tool/weapon._

**Universal Repair:** _Works with any damageable item—Swords, Pickaxes, Axes, Shovels, Hoes, Tridents, Bows, Crossbows, Shields, Fishing Rods, and more._

**Incremental Repair:** _Items are repaired gradually over time (approx. 160 seconds for a full cycle). If you remove an item early, it keeps the durability it regained!_

**Visual Feedback:** _Watch the particles shift colors (Red → Orange → Yellow → Green) as your item heals. Particles appear correctly positioned for every slot, including held items._

**Smart Interaction:** _The Armor Stand automatically shows arms when holding items and supports vanilla item swapping._

**Balanced Gameplay:** _The anvil isn't infinite! It takes realistic damage as it works (Anvil → Chipped → Damaged) and will eventually break after heavy usage._

**Safe & Reliable:** _Optimized server-side logic ensures no lag, persistent anvil damage tracking, and safe item drops if the station is broken._

**📦 Installation**

**Download the .jar file.**

**Drop the .jar file into your mods folder.**

**Enjoy your automated repair station!**

_'has absolutely nothing to do with kittens btw..but kittens rule the world.'_
